annotation_status: draft — confirmed cases (jtbd06-001, jtbd06-004, jtbd06-006, jtbd06-008, jtbd06-015) are high-confidence. Edge case jtbd06-009 requires annotator discussion.

duplicate_type_taxonomy.cross_source_same_event: Same event covered by two different publications on the same day. Canonical duplicate.
duplicate_type_taxonomy.continuation_of_same_legal_case: Amended filing or new participant in same legal proceeding. Should be flagged as duplicate of original case.
duplicate_type_taxonomy.deep_dive_follow_up_same_event: Detailed follow-up article covering same product launch, published within days.
duplicate_type_taxonomy.secondary_analysis_same_source_event: Article that derives its factual content from an already-seen source event.
duplicate_type_taxonomy.related_topic_different_event: Same topic/theme, different companies or different events. NOT a duplicate.
duplicate_type_taxonomy.related_same_product_different_events: Same product, sequential events (launch then adoption data). NOT a duplicate.
duplicate_type_taxonomy.same_company_different_event_type: Same company, different event category. NOT a duplicate.
duplicate_type_taxonomy.related_event_avito_parallel: International peer event vs Avito's own equivalent. CRITICAL: must NOT be flagged as duplicate.

confirmed_duplicates_from_project_data.jtbd06-001: Verified via story_id 'story_rightmove_agent_lawsuit_2026' in dedupe.json — both articles share this story_id
confirmed_duplicates_from_project_data.jtbd06-004: story_id 'story_costar_zillow_ip_litigation' — original Oct 2025 filing vs amended March 2026 complaint

critical_test_cases.jtbd06-002: MUST NOT be flagged as duplicate — multiple portal AI launches are separate events
critical_test_cases.jtbd06-006: MUST be flagged as duplicate — company newsroom + trade publication covering identical launch
critical_test_cases.jtbd06-012: CRITICAL — Avito's own launch MUST NOT be suppressed as duplicate of international peers
critical_test_cases.jtbd06-009: Edge case — M&A announcement vs completion 6 months later. Both answers acceptable with rationale.

notes: The corpus in each case contains 3 articles. In production, the corpus would typically be 5-15 articles from the lookback window.
Synthetic cases (jtbd06-006, jtbd06-008, jtbd06-009, jtbd06-010, jtbd06-011, jtbd06-012, jtbd06-013, jtbd06-014, jtbd06-015) are constructed to test specific failure modes.
jtbd06-012 (Avito AI search vs international peer AI search) is the highest-stakes test case — suppressing Avito's own product news as a 'duplicate' would be a critical system failure.
Duplicate ratio (6/15 = 40%) is intentionally higher than real-world rate to ensure balanced evaluation. Real-world rate may be 15-25%.
